description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a flat, elongated wooden deck with slightly upturned nose and tail. The top surface is covered with a dark, grippy material, likely black grip tape, providing traction for the rider. The deck is supported by two metal trucks, each holding a pair of small, white wheels, typical of street skateboards. The side profile reveals the layered construction of the deck, with a visible light wood core sandwiched between darker layers. There are no visible graphics or branding on the deck or wheels, giving it a minimalist appearance. The overall design is functional and streamlined, suitable for urban environments such as skate parks, sidewalks, and streets.
description: A minimalist skateboard with a black grip-taped wooden deck, white wheels, and metal trucks, designed for street use. The deck is plain with no visible graphics or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose of the skateboard, black grip tape, and partial visibility of the front wheels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the deck, the upturned nose and tail, and both sets of white wheels and metal trucks.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rounded tail, black grip tape, and partial visibility of the rear wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the deck's layered construction and both sets of wheels visible.
attribute_wheel_type: street, white, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard silver metal trucks, no visible branding, top-mount configuration
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
